nodes.name: Avelo_ASSEMBLY.md
nodes.summary: Project structure and directory assembly reference mapping top-level organization, Core subsystems (Database, Models, Repositories, Services, Validation, Utilities), Features modules, and Shared components with data-flow overview.

nodes.name: Avelo_Accounting_Logic_Audit.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive audit of accounting logic correctness covering P&L and balance-sheet accuracy, account semantics, GST handling, cash-flow detection, and stock-ageing constraints with prioritized findings and validated test scenarios.
nodes.languageNotes: Account-semantics matrix and workflow expectations documented with debit/credit expectations and regression scenarios.

nodes.name: Avelo_Architecture.md
nodes.summary: Normative architecture specification defining 15 layered subsystems including composition, storage, concurrency, database access, SwiftUI patterns, routing, accounting pipelines, reporting, backup/restore, schema evolution, audit, and production boundaries.
nodes.languageNotes: Strict layered model with unidirectional dependencies; views never import repositories; data layer never imports SwiftUI.

nodes.name: Avelo_Execution_Checklist.md
nodes.summary: Master execution checklist for v1.1 release defining P0/P1/P2 gate policies, Wave-based execution (P0-A through P2 phases), acceptance criteria, detailed evidence logs for completed items, and release-gate status.
nodes.languageNotes: Gates enforced at Wave level: P0-A (proof closure), P0-B (accounting/fiscal), P0-C (storage/UI/legal), P1-A/B/C, P2.

nodes.name: Avelo_Master_PRD.md
nodes.summary: Normative product requirements document defining Avelo as a 100% offline macOS accounting application for Indian small businesses, covering user personas, product model, company lifecycle, voucher/account workspaces, inventory, payroll, banking, reports, and keyboard contracts.
nodes.languageNotes: Single source of truth for product behavior; every screen, field, keyboard shortcut, and error message specified. Indian FY (1 April to 31 March) with multi-company support.

nodes.name: Avelo_Master_Product_Execution_Plan.md
nodes.summary: Master execution and product direction plan covering locked architecture decisions, central account eligibility, declarative definitions, contextual action registry, and 11 phased rollout (Phase 0 through Phase 10) with implementation strategies and verification gates.
nodes.languageNotes: Phased execution from Phase 0 (v1.1 correctness) through Phase 10 (Extension Language); includes authority statement and locked decisions.

nodes.name: Avelo_Module_Checklist.md
nodes.summary: Sequential module build checklist organized in 10 passes (Docs, Shared, Models, Database, Resources, Repositories, Services, Validation, App shell, Features) plus per-slice acceptance criteria for 8 slices (Foundation through Hardening).

nodes.name: Avelo_Naming_Freeze.md
nodes.summary: Naming freeze specification governing 11 categories: application/shared state, core domain names, persisted enum names/values, database boundary names, repository/service names, validation/report namespaces, SQL names, keyboard identifiers, and forbidden type names.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicit naming freeze for backward-compatibility; persisted enum raw values locked; database/repository/service names specified for deterministic codegen.

nodes.name: Avelo_Operator_Guide.md
nodes.summary: Quick-reference operator guide covering backup/restore, encryption, reports, inventory management, and search functionality with brief notes on unimplemented features.

nodes.name: Avelo_Phase0_Manual_Acceptance.md
nodes.summary: Phase 0 manual acceptance test specification defining accountant acceptance (company/FY/account selection, voucher keyboard, bills/cheques, reports), operator acceptance (backup/restore/keys/corruption, migration/storage), and accessibility/distribution criteria.

nodes.name: Avelo_Release_Board.md
nodes.summary: Release board and blocker tracking documenting V1 must-ship items, V2 encryption/performance work, V3 later hardening, top 10 release-blocking issues, and canonical backlog with P0/P1/P2 priority categories totaling 101 tracked items.

nodes.name: Avelo_Rules.md
nodes.summary: Non-negotiable core rules (20 rules) governing system constraints: 100% offline, manual entry, SQLite as record, Int64 paise arithmetic, double-entry validation, financial-year locks, optional inventory, company isolation, and audit append-only semantics.
nodes.languageNotes: Rules enforce strict invariants: offline-only, no URLSession/Analytics, every voucher balanced, no silent deletion, audit append-only, FY locks enforced at SQL trigger.

nodes.name: Avelo_Schema.md
nodes.summary: Complete normalized database schema specification covering 32 tables (companies, financial-years, accounts, vouchers, ledger-lines, inventory, payroll, audit-events, reconciliations, voucher-templates, BOMs, migrations, registry DB) with conventions, foreign-key relationships, and index guidance.
nodes.languageNotes: SQLite with foreign-key enforcement and migration policy; includes party-profiles (v24) and workspace-configurations (v26) tables.

nodes.name: Avelo_Status_Checklist.md
nodes.summary: Current implementation status and completion roadmap tracking Phase 0 foundation, core bookkeeping/reporting, inventory/banking/operational workflows, v1.1 release gates, and post-release phases through Phase 7 (offline compliance/payroll).

nodes.name: DX.md
nodes.summary: Developer experience and release evidence specification covering documentation ownership, first-run setup, daily development loop, SwiftPM state management, rule/release-candidate proof, benchmarks, and distribution runbooks for Developer ID and Mac App Store.
